channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Prediction markets want the Oscars to be your gateway drug to betting on everything
item.description: Though it was weird to see the Golden Globes partner with Polymarket for its most recent awards show, the collaboration wasn't shocking given the way that people have begun using prediction markets to gamble on basically anything. Prediction markets are being used to bet on everything from when wars might break out to who will […]

item.title: New Website ‘Channel Surfer’ Reinvents the Cable TV Couch Vegetation Experience for 2026
item.description: Turn on, tune in, drop out.

item.title: MacBook Air M5 review: a small update for the ‘just right’ Mac
item.description: Not much has changed in the new MacBook Air for 2026: It now has the M5 chip, Wi-Fi 7, and faster storage starting at 512GB instead of 256GB. It's just as outstanding a computer as last year's model, even if it's a shame it's $100 more expensive. The bigger change has happened to the Air. […]

item.title: It's hard to equal Resident Evil 4's quality, but Capcom did that for me with Resident Evil Requiem — it just needs one more thing for perfection
item.description: Capcom's critically acclaimed Resident Evil Requiem brought the best of both worlds from the franchise, but it's missing one big thing.

item.title: The Meta Quest 3S VR headset is one of our best entry-level VR headsets — and it's $50 off for a limited time
item.description: The Meta Quest 3S VR headset is one of our best entry-level VR headsets, and Walmart has an impressive $50 discount on the Batman: Arkham Shadow bundle.

item.title: The RedMagic 11 Air is no looker, but you won't find better gaming performance for the money
item.description: RedMagic doubles down on gaming performance with its latest budget device, at the expense of a few quality-of-life features.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, March 15 (game #1511)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, March 15 (game #1008)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, March 15 (game #742)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Nvidia : vous n’utilisez (surement) pas G-Sync correctement, voici comment le configurer
item.description: Nous vous expliquons dans cet article comment configurer la technologie G-Sync sur votre carte graphique Nvidia pour éliminer tout déchirement de l'image tout en bénéficiant d'une latence minimale dans tous vos jeux.

item.title: Sora video generator is coming to ChatGPT, insiders say
item.description: Insiders say OpenAI will integrate Sora 2 model into ChatGPT, turbocharging the chatbot's capabilities.

item.title: Steven Spielberg Thinks Aliens Are Real, and Wants to Hang With Them
item.description: With 'Disclosure Day' on the horizon, Spielberg wants everyone to know he's real believer when it comes to aliens.

item.title: A critical Windows 11 bug has locked some users out of the C: drive, Microsoft admits — here's what you can do if you're affected
item.description: We've got another significant Windows 11 bug to report, which seems to be mostly impacting Samsung laptops.

item.title: Deux tablettes Android en promo à moins de 300 € : entre Xiaomi ou OnePlus, laquelle vaut vraiment le coup ?
item.description: La Xiaomi Redmi Pad 2 Pro et la OnePlus Pad Go 2 séduisent par leur excellent rapport qualité-prix, avec un 7/10 dans nos tests. En promotion sous la barre des 300 euros, elles brillent encore plus. Mais laquelle est faite pour vous ? Découvrez notre comparatif complet pour faire votre choix.

item.title: A Scavengers Reign artist explores contemplative sci-fi in new comics
item.description: You may recognize Jonathan Djob Nkondo's work from animated projects like the surreal sci-fi series Scavengers Reign or the recent Gorillaz short film The Mountain, The Moon Cave and The Sad God. But before that the French artist and animator made self-published comics that depicted strange alien worlds and future societies. Now he's revisiting that […]...

item.title: Proof over promises: a new doctrine for cybersecurity
item.description: The need to shift from trust-based compliance to evidence-based security.

item.title: These People Want Us to Let Them Hook Up AI to a Nuclear Weapon
item.description: Hopefully they put the idea in an email sent to the wrong address.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for March 14, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.
